function.name: log_patient
function.description: Log a patient visit or clinical note into the system. Use this whenever the user wants to record a new patient interaction, complaint, symptom, vital sign, or clinical observation. Examples: 'log Jane — fever 38.5°C', 'note that Bed 3 received paracetamol at 2pm', 'record that Mr. Smith is complaining of chest pain'.

patient_name.description: Name or identifier of the patient (e.g. 'Mary', 'Bed 4', 'Mr. Smith'). Use exactly what the user said.

note.description: The full clinical note, observation, or description to record. Be thorough — include symptoms, vitals, medications given, or any actions taken.

time.description: Time of the visit or observation, e.g. '14:30', '3pm', 'now'. Defaults to the current time if not specified.

function.name: get_patients_today
function.description: Retrieve the full list of patients seen on a given date or during a specific shift. Use when the user asks: who have I seen, list my patients, who was logged today/yesterday, show me this morning's patients, etc.

shift.description: Which shift to retrieve patients for. Use 'morning' (06:00–12:00), 'afternoon' (12:00–18:00), 'evening' (18:00–00:00), or 'all' for the full day. Defaults to 'all'.

date.description: Date to query in YYYY-MM-DD format, or the keywords 'today' or 'yesterday'. Defaults to 'today'.

function.name: get_patient_notes
function.description: Retrieve all logged notes for a specific patient by name. Use when the user asks what was noted, documented, or recorded for a particular patient. Examples: 'what was logged for Jane?', 'show me Jane's notes', 'what is the note for Bed 4?', 'what did we record about Mr. Smith?'.

patient_name.description: Name or identifier of the patient to look up (e.g. 'Jane', 'Bed 4'). Case-insensitive partial match is supported.

date.description: Optional date filter in YYYY-MM-DD format, or 'today' / 'yesterday'. Leave blank to search all dates.

function.name: update_patient_note
function.description: Amend or correct the clinical note of a previously logged patient entry. Use when the user wants to edit, correct, or update a note that was already saved. Examples: 'correct Jane's note', 'update the note for Bed 4 to say high fever', 'change the record for Mr. Smith'.

patient_name.description: Name or identifier of the patient whose most recent log entry should be updated.

new_note.description: The corrected or updated clinical note to replace the existing one.

date.description: Optional date of the entry to update (YYYY-MM-DD, 'today', or 'yesterday'). Defaults to today.

function.name: delete_patient_log
function.description: Delete a specific patient log entry by its ID. Use when the user wants to remove an incorrect or duplicate entry. The ID can be found in the result of get_patient_notes or a previous log_patient response.

entry_id.description: The unique UUID of the log entry to delete, e.g. '9719ffb2-eff3-4584-bc85-437d45564c0d'.

function.name: set_reminder
function.description: Set a timed clinical reminder or alert. Use when the user says 'remind me', 'check on', 'alert me in X minutes', 'don't let me forget', etc. Examples: 'remind me to check Jane's drip in 30 minutes', 'alert me in an hour to give Bed 4 his medication'.

message.description: The reminder message, including patient name and action if relevant, e.g. 'Check Bed 4 IV drip' or 'Administer paracetamol to Jane'.

delay_minutes.description: How many minutes from now to trigger the reminder. Convert hours to minutes (e.g. 1 hour = 60 minutes).

function.name: summarise_shift
function.description: Generate a structured summary or handover report for a shift's patient notes. Use when the user asks for a shift summary, handover notes, end-of-shift report, or wants an overview of what happened during a shift.

format.description: Style of the summary: 'brief' = one-line per patient; 'detailed' = full notes per patient; 'handover' = structured format ready for the next shift.

date.description: Date to summarise in YYYY-MM-DD format, or the keywords 'today' or 'yesterday'. Defaults to 'today'.
